items.title: Ring-Zero: Scaling Zero RL to a Trillion Parameters for Emergent Reasoning
items.core_innovation: First zero-RL reasoning study at trillion-parameter scale
items.significance: Reveals reasoning emergence dynamics inaccessible at small scale

items.title: Accelerating Masked Diffusion Large Language Models: A Survey
items.core_innovation: Consolidates caching/reuse techniques for dLLM inference
items.significance: Diffusion LLMs need specialized accel to beat autoregressive

items.title: AVQ-Attention: Adaptive Vector-Quantized Attention
items.core_innovation: Adaptive codebook capacity for VQ attention approximation
items.significance: Improves attention efficiency vs uniform VQ methods

items.title: Saturation Makes Quantization Error Additive: A Coverage Model
items.core_innovation: Shows sensitivity-based quantization premise breaks at 4-bit
items.significance: Challenges core assumption behind HAWQ-style mixed precision

items.title: FlashDiff: Efficient Regional Execution and Scheduling for Diffusion Serving
items.core_innovation: Regional execution scheduling cuts diffusion serving latency
items.significance: Addresses diffusion-specific bottleneck in multi-GPU serving

items.title: HyperSafe: Inference-Time Safety Recovery for Fine-Tuned Models
items.core_innovation: Post-hoc, model-specific safety recovery without retraining
items.significance: Cheap fix for fine-tuning-induced safety degradation

items.title: Decomposing Runtime, Kernel, and Quantization Speedups via Matched FP16
items.core_innovation: Attributes quantized-serving speedups to runtime vs kernel
items.significance: Corrects inflated quantization speedup claims in literature

items.title: Reliability Scaling Laws for Quantized Large Language Models
items.core_innovation: First reliability (perturbation robustness) scaling laws for quant LLMs
items.significance: Quantized accuracy on clean data hides robustness gaps

items.title: Proxy Exploration and Reusable Guidance (PUST)
items.core_innovation: Decouples policy exploration from distribution alignment via proxy
items.significance: Enables async, reusable, cross-model post-training signals

items.title: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Physics
items.core_innovation: Continuous PDE-solver rewards for post-training LLMs
items.significance: Moves RLVR beyond binary rewards into scientific code-gen

items.title: Do AI Agents Know When a Task Is Simple?
items.significance: Addresses agent overhead from unnecessary max-context reads

items.title: SCOPE-RL: Optimizing Reasoning Paths Before and After Success
